text:
Every evening, after rain, the streetlights swayed like old ships. I like to watch them. There's something soothing about the way they move. One night, a white owl flew down. It hooted softly. Then it flew away. Just like that. No fear. Just peace. That night I went outside. Just like they did. No lights. Just stars. I fell asleep. I had a dream. I walked into a field. It looked like snow. But it was soft. I sat down. A ladybird came. Then another. Then they flew away. But I had their spots. I was beautiful. Just like them. I looked longingly at their spots. Then I flew away. Just like them. That night I slept well. Just like that owl.

There you go. Just some things you love. Just like that owl.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
